description: A soft, cocoa-flavored layer cake known for its red color and its common pairing with cream cheese frosting. The color may come from food coloring, cocoa reactions, or both depending on the recipe.
preparation_steps: Prepare the cake batter with the dry and wet ingredients.
Add cocoa and red coloring and mix until smooth.
Bake in cake pans until set.
Fill and frost with cream cheese frosting.

health_advice.benefits: Best treated as an occasional celebratory dessert.
health_advice.risks: Often high in sugar, refined flour, and fat, especially with generous frosting.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Keep portions moderate and balance it with an otherwise nutritious meal pattern.

dietary_notes.note: Traditional versions are usually vegetarian but not vegan or gluten-free. Vegan and gluten-free adaptations are possible.

common_variations: Layered red velvet cake with cream cheese frosting
